subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-08
subcodes.first_line: Divine favor, like the sun, appears from different dawning places. In the early days, the prophets were the dawning places of the divine benedictions.
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @oneness; unity of religion, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @Manifestation of God as sun
